---
title: "Word Guess Project Instructions"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output:
  bookdown::gitbook:
    toc_depth: 1
    number_sections: false
    collapse: section
    scroll_highlight: yes
---

#  ⚠️ Instructions Disclaimer  
-  The purpose of this guide is to help you write and test your code.
-  It is important you do the steps in order.
-  This guide will give you test codes you can copy and paste into your code file to simulate input/output. It should be placed after your code.
-  If your code passes the test code you should get all ✅,  else ❌. Look at errors to edit your code. 
-  Delete test code after you have successfully passed all checks. 
-  You are encouraged to attempt before using 💡hints.
-  The files, code, and links in this project are safe to download, open, and run.
However, always exercise caution when downloading, opening, or running files, code, or clicking links from any unknown source.
